behavior_summary: Purely combinational barrel shifter that treats its 50-bit input as 10 contiguous 5-bit symbols, shifts the symbol array toward lower indices by the 3-bit shift amount, fills vacated most-significant symbols with the provided 5-bit fill value, and asserts out_valid whenever the requested shift is in the supported 0–4 range.
edge_cases: Shift values 0–4 inclusive are considered valid and produce a defined result; any shift above 4 forces out_valid low and the output data must be treated as invalid/unspecified.

When the shift amount would require more than 10 symbols, the specification does not define wraparound; vacated slots are filled with the supplied fill symbol and the remaining symbols that would index beyond the input range are effectively ignored.
A single fill symbol is replicated across all vacated most-significant positions; there is no per-position fill source.
